creator: landonf@threerings.net
text:
I've updated the patch with the following changes:
	- Replace suser(9) calls with the just-added priv(9).
	- Clean up some accidental cruft.
	- Included updated tun(4) and tap(4) man pages.

The new patch is available from:
	http://www.opendarwin.org/~landonf/code/patch-tuntap_ifclone

'patch-kern_conf.c' was not updated.
